_gate_calibration.notes: Fail rule: acc AND gyro magnitude correlation must BOTH fall below the floor (pairing breakage kills both channels; a single weak channel is generator quality — e.g. HuMoGen-origin's Z-up gravity in the Y-up world corrupts acc only — and must stay in the benchmark for L2 to punish). Axis-level correlations are NOT gated (frame conventions differ; acc-axis pearson is negative even on the aligned S1_freestyle3 pair). Full-corpus measurement 2026-07-05: all 148 streams have healthy gyro (0.16-0.56); 16 streams have weak acc, 10 of them humogen.

_notes: window_len=24 / stride=16 mirror the main project's window convention so conclusions translate.
target_fps=60 assumes the TotalCapture Xsens rate; M1 must confirm it against the real stream and the SMPL-X mocap_frame_rate, and M2 resamples both streams to target_fps if they differ.
gate thresholds calibrated on S1_freestyle3 — see _gate_calibration.
normalization stats are computed from the TRAINING source only and applied unchanged to val/test — see src/sim2real/windows.py docstring.
